_comment: MSE element-node payloads (PepTalk `get` body) for an on-air Stripe, before and after an on-air Line_1 edit. Format per Media Sequencer document and API §'Live Update Support' / created-element example (l.4830): the live field values live on <entry name='data'> numeric leaf subnodes (4-layer model = 1-indexed). The decoy <entry name='5'> under <entry name='schema'> must NOT be captured. An on-air edit changes only this MSE document, never the saved Pilot DB element (shoot §8.3/§8.5).
before: 2 ok {640}<element name="2380782"><ref name="master_template">/external/pilotdb/master_templates/16097</ref><entry name="schema"><entry name="5">DECOY-NOT-A-FIELD</entry></entry><entry name="data"><entry name="1">דרעי מצטרף לקריאה לפיזור הכנסת</entry><entry name="2">יו"ר ש"ס מצטרף</entry></entry></element>
after: 2 ok {630}<element name="2380782"><ref name="master_template">/external/pilotdb/master_templates/16097</ref><entry name="schema"><entry name="5">DECOY-NOT-A-FIELD</entry></entry><entry name="data"><entry name="1">ועכשיו כתוב פה משהו אחר לגמרי!</entry><entry name="2">יו"ר ש"ס מצטרף</entry></entry></element>
